spec.description: UniFi Poller v2.0.1 Displays detailed information for wireless access points in a UniFi network using Prometheus.

spec.title: 5 GHz Traffic
spec.description: RX is on the negative Axis.

spec.title: 5 GHz Packets
spec.description: PPS on the na band. In is on the negative Axis.

spec.title: 2.4 GHz Traffic
spec.description: RX is on the negative Axis.

spec.title: 2.4 GHz Packets
spec.description: PPS on the ng band calculated in 30 second buckets. In is on the negative Axis.

spec.title: 2.4 GHz Drops/Errors
spec.description: In is on the negative axis.

spec.title: Wireless Traffic / Vendor
spec.description: Devices TX / RX bytes per second grouped by OUI. RX on negative axis.

spec.title: Networks / UAP
spec.description: The counters in this table represent uptime totals and do not change with the time range selector.

spec.title: Clients / Channel
spec.description: Visualize wireless channel usage w/ wired client counts.

spec.title: Clients / AP Radio
spec.description: Visualize how many clients are connected to which radios/APs.

spec.title: Client / MAC OUI
spec.description: This shows an OUI breakdown from Unifi's perspective.

spec.title: 5 GHz Drops/Errors
spec.description: Visualize packet errors (several types)  per second in the 5GHz band.

spec.title: UniFi-Poller: UAP Insights - Prometheus
